comment: HIGH/CRITICAL npm vulnerabilities we are knowingly accepting. Every entry MUST have a reason + expiry. CI will break if a listed entry expires or if an unlisted HIGH/CRITICAL vuln appears.

allowed.reason: xlsx/SheetJS has no upstream patch. Used only for admin-side CSV/XLSX exports — not exposed to untrusted user input. Tracked for replacement with exceljs in follow-up.

Next 15.5.15 patch introduces a ReactCurrentDispatcher issue in CI (Linux chromium prerender) with react-dom 18.3.1. Sticking with 15.5.14 until we can coordinate a react 18→19 + next 15→16 migration. Our rate-limit middleware already blunts the DoS impact. Short expiry forces revisit.
